policy.note: This report groups pending human decisions for review only. It does not apply decisions, approve assets, promote media, upload files or write public manifests.

batches.label: Batch A: Villa Savoye Image Candidates
batches.intent: Decide whether any Villa Savoye image candidate should enter a deeper source/credit review.
recommended_stance: If no public preview is needed now, leave all three blocked.
If a preview is needed, open a separate source-basis review before any public-ready change.

items.title: villa-savoye-exterior-savoye-3-cc0
items.prompt: Approve public display or keep blocked?
items.command_hint: Edit owner-review-decision-session-2026-06-13.json, then run npm run kosmo:owner-decision-session-check.

items.title: villa-savoye-exterior-loc-full
items.prompt: Approve public display with LOC/credit review or keep blocked?
items.command_hint: Edit owner-review-decision-session-2026-06-13.json, then run npm run kosmo:owner-decision-session-check.

items.title: villa-savoye-interior-chaise-cc-by-sa
items.prompt: Approve only if attribution and ShareAlike obligations are accepted, or keep blocked?
items.command_hint: Edit owner-review-decision-session-2026-06-13.json, then run npm run kosmo:owner-decision-session-check.

batches.label: Batch B: Villa Savoye Derived Files
batches.intent: Keep generated or derived Villa Savoye files from becoming public-facing without source-basis review.
recommended_stance: Record `keep_blocked` unless the owner explicitly starts a source-basis review for this batch.

batches.label: Batch C: Model Promotion Confirmation
batches.intent: Prevent diagrammatic massing/model studies from being presented as measured or source-complete architecture models.
recommended_stance: Defer promotion until a separate model-quality and source-confidence review exists.

items.title: villa-savoye
items.prompt: Confirm model promotion only after accepting diagrammatic, not-measured status?
items.command_hint: Edit owner-review-decision-session-2026-06-13.json, then run npm run kosmo:owner-decision-session-check.

items.title: alterszentrum-kloster-ingenbohl
items.prompt: Confirm model promotion only after accepting diagrammatic, not-measured status?
items.command_hint: Edit owner-review-decision-session-2026-06-13.json, then run npm run kosmo:owner-decision-session-check.

batches.label: Batch D: Sogn Benedetg Source Gap
batches.intent: Keep the Sogn Benedetg lane honest until the larger private library roots are visible.
recommended_stance: Keep open until the large OneDrive/book/ETH/HSLU library can be indexed or mounted.

items.title: sogn-benedetg-source-gap
items.prompt: Find private library root or keep Sogn link-only with review-only study assets?
items.command_hint: Edit owner-review-decision-session-2026-06-13.json, then run npm run kosmo:owner-decision-session-check.

batches.label: Batch E: KosmoAsset Human Reviews
batches.intent: Review local-only study assets for Blender, DXF, web and future ArchiCAD workflows without public promotion.
recommended_stance: Use `needs-review` until a named reviewer has opened the local files.
Use `block-public` for anything that should remain private/local even after local approval.

items.title: Villa Savoye Concrete Frame Material Study
items.prompt: Complete human review for Villa Savoye Concrete Frame Material Study on route blender.

worker_protocol: Present one batch at a time to the owner or reviewer.
Never convert this report into decisions directly.
After a reference decision edit, run `npm run kosmo:owner-decision-session-check`.
After an asset decision edit, run `npm run kosmo:asset-full-review -- --library examples/kosmo-assets/kosmoreferences-pilot-seed-library-2026-06-13/library.json`.
After any human-decision update, run `npm run kosmo:data-lane-sweep`.
